title: Side Missions
text:
Life is a choose-your-own-adventure game. This is a log of my journey, covering everything from the main missions of my professional work to the side quests that keep life interesting.

title: About me
text:
I am an analytics professional with a passion for building end-to-end data solutions that bridge complex backend engineering with high-level strategic insights. My expertise lies in architecting robust measurement frameworks, automating reporting workflows and driving data integrity to support executive decision-making.
I have the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-volume, and deadline-driven environment with experience in data manipulation and statistical tools such as SQL, R, Python, and Tableau. Being an applied data analyst, I understand the math behind statistical models and work to ensure deliverables are of the highest quality.
I am driven by complex problem-solving - whether it is debugging a critical datasource error, projecting revenue impacts through sandbox analysis or mentoring peers on SQL and dashboarding best practices. I am constantly expanding my toolkit, recently focusing on GenAI applications and advanced statistical modeling to drive the next generation of analytics.

title: About me
text:
Professional Experience

Google






Marketing Analyst, Ads Marketing Analytics August 2022 - Present | Mountain View, CA




Led the conception, coding, and production launch of Shadowfax, an automated email system delivering weekly event performance reports to 600+ PMMs.
Spearheaded the end-to-end development of a Company-Level Dashboard, managing stakeholders, backend infrastructure, and legal review.
Built comprehensive reporting infrastructure and interactive dashboards to empower senior leadership with insights into global event performance.
Reduced data processing time by 80% by creating efficient data pipelines with custom macros for event impact metrics.




The Home Depot






Sr. Analyst, Interconnected Merchandising Insights September 2019 - August 2022 | Atlanta, GA




Implemented Causal Impact algorithms (Python, R) to identify top subscription items, contributing to 40% YoY growth.
Created a Tableau dashboard for the Online Pricing team, saving 55 hours of effort per event.
Mentored an intern in developing diagnostic reports for negative margin items, providing actionable recovery solutions.




Institute of Transportation Studies (ITS)
Data Analyst September 2018 - July 2019 | San Francisco, CA

Segmented customers by membership type to identify usage trends using SQL and Tableau.
Performed congestion analysis to identify high-potential stations based on demand and utilization.




Accenture






Application Development Analyst August 2016 - March 2018 | Hyderabad, India

title: About me
Main missions and Side Quests
text:
It’s all a game…
I view life as one big choose-your-own-adventure game where every turn reveals infinite possibilities.
At any given moment, I am either locked into my main missions-honing my technical skills and advancing in my career-or embarking on side quests to explore my broader passions. These side missions are where I dive into learning the guitar, sketching, or wandering through the world of esoteric concepts.
Thinking about life this way keeps every day exciting. I get to decide when it’s time to progress the storyline and when it’s time to explore a new path just to see what perks it might offer.
You can check out my current quests below.
